raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J12345",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The revised introduction tightly integrates the contribution claim with evidence from Henderson and Park (2021) and subsequent work, demonstrating a clear audit of load-bearing claims against corresponding references.",
    "R1.4": "The text maps AgentSift against the nearest 3-5 works (Henderson and Park, Liu et al., Ortega-Williams), identifying sharp deltas in detection accuracy and signal properties.",
    "R1.7": "Every load-bearing citation is audited; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision (e.g., Henderson and Park 2021).",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence (e.g., uncertainty disclosure regarding the '4.1 points above the previous best' figure).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no drift or scope violations.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., limitations of the consistency probe against certain attacker strategies).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (e.g., uncertainty disclosure regarding ablation interpretation)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.95,
    "R1.7": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The revised introduction tightly integrates the contribution claim with evidence from Henderson and Park (2021) and subsequent work, demonstrating a clear audit of load-bearing claims against corresponding references.
rationale.R1.4: The text maps AgentSift against the nearest 3-5 works (Henderson and Park, Liu et al., Ortega-Williams), identifying sharp deltas in detection accuracy and signal properties.
rationale.R1.7: Every load-bearing citation is audited; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision (e.g., Henderson and Park 2021).
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence (e.g., uncertainty disclosure regarding the '4.1 points above the previous best' figure).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no drift or scope violations.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., limitations of the consistency probe against certain attacker strategies).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (e.g., uncertainty disclosure regarding ablation interpretation).
